Q01.evidence: Full named spec, decision gate (4 conditions), empirical evidence basis, NIST + EU AI Act refs. Unambiguous and complete.

Q02.evidence: Trigger clearly defined. Non-overlapping: P-34 is calibration prerequisite FOR P-27, not substitute.

Q03.evidence: Decision gate encodes tradeoffs. Explicit tradeoff block missing vs P-01–P-10 format. Resolve at merge.

Q04.evidence: KAPPA v3.5→v3.6, 14×12 grid, governance_clear 82.6%→100%, BLG-01 closed. Strongest evidence in P-27+ range.

Q05.evidence: Validated via KAPPA calibration work. No explicit components/ ref path listed. Add at merge.

Q06.evidence: P-27, P-30, P-03 all cross-referenced by number. Consistent across all registry files.

Q07.evidence: Layer 7 Router Calibration — correct. Calibration method for P-27 and P-28.

Q08.evidence: Compositionally distinct from all P-01–P-33. COMPOSE registration correct.

Q09.evidence: NIST Measure + EU AI Act Art.9 — accurate. Art.13 advisory only.

Q10.evidence: Full provenance: S066, SESSION_ANCHOR, ENSEMBLE_ROSTER, CO_ORCH_QUEUE all confirm.

Q11.evidence: Recommended for adoption. Empirical-before-ML is high-value governance heuristic. Advisory: finalize spec format at merge.

scoring_summary.attestation_note: A-TIER 94.5% with 2 minor open BLGs. Both resolvable at Phase 3 merge. Pattern structurally sound, empirically validated, correctly layered, recommended for canonical promotion. Conditional attestation valid per P-30 gate. Ender ratified 2026-05-30.
